opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My arms are covered in giant blisters that itch so badly I feel like tearing my skin off. It's spreading everywhere.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Rapidly blistering, unbearably itchy rash on both forearms since gardening yesterday.

symptom_narrative.onset: ~12 hours after clearing brush/weeds; rash 24 hours ago
symptom_narrative.character: intensely itchy, burning red patches with blisters, some weeping
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: backs of both forearms and hands, in streaks
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: streaky/linear pattern, oozing/crusting where blisters burst; no fever, no breathing problem

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: cleared dense brush/weeds in the garden the day before

objective_data_offered.value: red streaky patches with tense blisters on the backs of both forearms and hands, some burst and weeping; matches where plants brushed my skin
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: camera view; cannot examine mucosa or assess for systemic disease

objective_data_offered.value: no fever, no facial/mouth swelling, breathing normal
